added: Initial release with core video downloading functionality
YouTube download support (video only, audio only, or video+audio with merging)
Support for all video quality options from the original source
Multi-platform support: X (Twitter), Facebook, Reddit, Instagram, and more
Multiple format selection (MP4, WebM, audio formats)
Built with Kivy 2.3.0 for smooth Android experience
Powered by yt-dlp for reliable video extraction
Custom pure-Python MP4/WebM muxer (no native binaries required)
Optimized for Android 13 (API 33) with arm64-v8a architecture
